calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name - of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Lolita Cain, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for Minor: Isiah Cain, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: ISIAH ELIJAH MARSELL CAIN.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Reset To Dec-02-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Lolita Cain, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Isiah Cain, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Dec. 2, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Reset To Nov-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
